$comment: MCP servers the exec-agent pod registers with `codex mcp add` into CODEX_HOME. Codex-harness turns only see MCP through Codex's own config, NOT openclaw.json. toolchain/install.sh reads this file. A stdio server is skipped when any of its `requires` env vars is unset. drawio MCP is intentionally absent: @drawio/mcp opens a desktop editor (GUI), useless headless — the graph-generation skill renders drawio via its bundled postprocessor + playwright instead.

mermaid.description: Hosted Mermaid diagram rendering for the graph-generation skill

media-playwright.description: Headless browser to render D3.js charts and capture PNGs for the graph-generation skill
